summary: Completed backend + frontend regression testing for subsection removal-to-zero and unarchive lifecycle behavior. All requested flows passed on public URL.
action_items: No blocking fixes required for requested scope.
Optional maintainability: split oversized TemplatesPage and server modules into smaller units.
critical_code_review_comments: /app/frontend/src/pages/TemplatesPage.jsx is 1117 lines (>700 guideline), increasing regression risk and test maintenance cost.
/app/backend/server.py is 1250 lines (>700 guideline), should be modularized by domain routers/services.
seed_data_creation: Created test templates with prefixes TEST_UNARCHIVE_* (API) and TEST_UI_UNARCH_* (UI) during regression checks; one UI template remains active in draft state.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Validated with admin/admin123 from /app/memory/test_credentials.md. Unarchive endpoint and UI both enforce archived=false + status=draft. Builder setup select correctly excludes the unarchived draft template.
rca of the issue: No defect reproduced in requested scope. The implemented logic in backend unarchive endpoint explicitly resets status to draft and archived=false, and the builder list consumes /template-library/ready which filters status=ready and archived!=true.
